info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Pipeline Service. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub.

tags.name: Pipelines
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Pipelines.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Organization identifier

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project identifier

parameters.name: Harness-Account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization methods other than the x-api-key header. If you are using the x-api-key header, this can be skipped.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items on each page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching the search term.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parameter on the basis of which sorting is done.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order on the basis of which sorting is done.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Harness module which is part of the Pipeline.

parameters.name: filter_identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of a saved Filter.

parameters.name: pipeline_identifiers
parameters.description: List of Pipeline identifiers on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Pipeline Name on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Pipeline Description on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter tags as a key:value pair.

key_and_value.summary: Tag having both Key and Value.

parameters.name: service_names
parameters.description: Service names on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: env_names
parameters.description: Names of Environments on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: deployment_type
parameters.description: Deployment type on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

parameters.name: repository
parameters.description: Repository name on the basis of which the Pipelines are filtered.

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

GitDetails.title: Git Response Details

file_path.description: File path of the Entity in the repository.

GitDetails.description: Git Experience related details of the Entity.

template_applied_pipeline_yaml.description: Pipeline YAML after resolving Templates (returned as a String).

valid.description: Specifies whether Pipeline is a valid or not.

store_type.description: Specifies whether the Entity is to be stored in Git or not (for Git Experience).

connector_ref.description: Identifier of the Harness Connector used for CRUD operations on the Entity (for Git Experience).

valid.description: Specifies whether Pipeline is a valid or not.

errors_count.description: Number of errors on each of the last 7 days.

deployments_count.description: Number of deployments on each of the last 7 days.

pipeline_yaml.description: Pipeline YAML (to be passed as a String).

example-pipeline.pipeline_yaml:
pipeline:
  allowStageExecutions: false
  stages:
    - stage:
        name: Example Build Stage
        identifier: example_build_stage
        description: ''
        type: Approval
        spec:
          execution:
            steps:
              - step:
                  name: Approval Step
                  identifier: Approval_Step
                  type: HarnessApproval
                  timeout: 1d
                  spec:
                    approvalMessage: |-
                      Please review the following information
                      and approve the pipeline progression
                    includePipelineExecutionHistory: true
                    approvers:
                      minimumCount: 1
                      disallowPipelineExecutor: false
                      userGroups: <+input>
                    approverInputs: []
              - step:
                  type: ShellScript
                  name: ShellScript Step
                  identifier: ShellScript_Step
                  spec:
                    shell: Bash
                    onDelegate: true
                    source:
                      type: Inline
                      spec:
                        script: <+input>
                    environmentVariables: []
                    outputVariables: []
                    executionTarget: {}
                  timeout: 10m
        tags: {}
    - stage:
        name: Example Deploy Stage
        identifier: example_deploy_stage
        description: ''
        type: Deployment
        spec:
          serviceConfig:
            serviceRef: <+input>
            serviceDefinition:
              spec:
                variables: []
              type: Kubernetes
          infrastructure:
            environmentRef: <+input>
            infrastructureDefinition:
              type: KubernetesDirect
              spec:
                connectorRef: <+input>
                namespace: <+input>
                releaseName: release-<+INFRA_KEY>
            allowSimultaneousDeployments: false
          execution:
            steps:
              - step:
                  name: Rollout Deployment
                  identifier: rolloutDeployment
                  type: K8sRollingDeploy
                  timeout: 10m
                  spec:
                    skipDryRun: false
            rollbackSteps:
              - step:
                  name: Rollback Rollout Deployment
                  identifier: rollbackRolloutDeployment
                  type: K8sRollingRollback
                  timeout: 10m
                  spec: {}
        tags: {}
        failureStrategies:
          - onFailure:
              errors:
                - AllErrors
              action:
                type: StageRollback
example-pipeline.name: ExamplePipeline

fqn.description: Fully Qualified Name as per YAML
